features: DISCREET HEALING: Masterplast Clear Plasters are flexible, discreet and can be worn in the bath, shower or whilst swimming. Suitable for a variety of cuts and grazes
ABSORB & HEAL: The combination of a durable soft touch top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection, a flexible, comfortable plaster suitable for cuts and grazes
STERILE: Individually wrapped for safety, four assorted sizes to suit a variety of cuts and grazes.
ASSORTED SIZES: Includes 100 plasters in four sizes suitable for a variety of cuts and grazes,
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 100 Plasters
description: Product Description Masterplast Clear Plasters are flexible, discreet and can be worn in the bath, shower or whilst swimming. The combination of a durable soft touch top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection, a flexible, comfortable plaster suitable for cuts and grazes. Box of 100 Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster, press gently to secure. Can be worn in the bath, shower, or whilst swimming. Avoid using on broken skin or severe wounds. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. 151 Products (Ireland), Block 3, Harcourt Centre, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, D02 A339, Ireland.
